para_trans: General under Integrated Child Development Services Scheme
Distribution of funds for the financial year 2025-2026
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Women and Child Development
Government Decision No: ABVI-2025 / P.No.90 (Part-I) / CA. 06
New Administration Building, 3rd Floor,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: March 17, 2026
Read: - 1) Finance Department Government Circular No. Finance-2025 / Q. No.44 / Finance-3, D. 12.03.2026.
The Government's Decisions:
Financial assistance for general expenses under the Integrated Child Development Services Scheme 2025-26
For the year, the Principal Accounting Head / Subhead / Target in the following returns, ROCANA No. 2, ROCANA No. 3, here.
Total Rs. 135.40 lakh (literal Rs. 1 crore) as shown in Rakaana No.5 from the revised estimates mentioned.
Thirty-five lakh forty thousand only) to be distributed and spent by the Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme.
Approval is being given.
(Rs. in Lakhs)
2. The Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme, Navi Mumbai has provided the following:
The funds should be spent in the prescribed manner.
3. The said Government Decision is pursuant to the circular dated 12.03.2026 dated No. 1 in reference to the Department of Finance.
Is being issued as agreed upon.
